response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior full-stack engineer with ~13 years of experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, but the resume shows no evidence of executive leadership, scaling teams from 10 to 30+, production multi-agent AI systems, fintech/credit-risk infrastructure, or distributed-systems leadership at the scale this CTO role demands. The profile is several seniority levels below the requirement.
strengths: 13+ years across web, backend, embedded, and distributed systems with polyglot delivery
Recent hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Strong software craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, public talks and workshops
concerns: No executive/CTO experience and no track record of scaling engineering orgs to 30+ or building a senior leadership layer
No demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems, LLM evaluation pipelines, or agentic framework architecture at scale
Limited fintech depth — no credit-risk, working-capital, liquidity, or regulated financial infrastructure experience

key_factors.factor: Lack of executive leadership and team scaling track record
No production multi-agent AI or agentic framework architecture experience
Missing fintech / regulated credit-risk infrastructure background
